category_sources: Official README describes ghr creating GitHub Releases and uploading artifacts.
source_facts.description says it uploads multiple artifacts to GitHub Release in parallel.
display_name_sources: Official repository and README use ghr.
docs_sources: Go package documentation mirrors the module README and source documentation.
Official GitHub README provides usage, options, installation, and GitHub Actions examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/tcnksm/ghr; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README documents release creation, artifact upload, and GitHub Actions usage.
source_facts.description mentions GitHub Release artifact upload.
